title: aurantium × myrtifolium
intro: Aurantium × myrtifolium, also known as the bitter orange myrtle or cold-hardy orange, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the bitter orange (Citrus aurantium) and the myrtle (Myrtus communis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aurantium × myrtifolium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used to make a fragrant and medicinal essential oil.
